SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:41am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, Dept. 525, nothing on the record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Edward Rekhtman appears in Pro Per. Respondent, Angelika Gogolitsyna appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) Miscellaneous documents, 11 pages
EXHA (1) Itemized statement of Security Deposit
EXHA (2) Envelope of photos of floor
EXHA (3) Envelope of photos of walls
EXHA (4) Envelope of photos of post cleaning and repairs
EXHA (5) Envelope of photos of areas to be cleaned

Evidence retained, matter is submitted.
